popups-desc: Waxay soo bandhigtaa daaqado horudhac ah marka isticmaaluhu uu dul maro xiriiriye
popups-settings-option-page-description: Itus weeraha ugu horaysa ee bogga iyo muujin sawir. Tani waxaa lagula talinayaa aqristayaasha.
popups-settings-option-reference-descrip: Hel horudhac degdeg ah oo tixraac ah marka aad akhrinayso bog.
popups-settings-help: Dib waad u howl galin kartaa horfiirinta adigoo adeegsanaya linkiga hoose ee bogga.
popups-settings-enable: Wax ka beddel dejimaha horudhaca wax ka beddelka
popups-preview-no-preview: Dhibaato ayaa ka dhacday muujinta horudhacan
popups-preview-disambiguation: Cinwaankan wuxuu la xiriiraa in ka badan hal bog
popups-prefs-optin: Daar horudhaca bogagga (hel horudhac degdeg ah oo mawduuc ah marka aad akhrinayso bog)
popups-prefs-disable-nav-gadgets-info: Waa inaad [[$1|damiisaa aaladda Navigation popups]] ee ku jirta dejimaha Gadgets-ka si aad u awoodsiiso horudhaca bogagga.
popups-prefs-conflicting-gadgets-info: Qaar ka mid ah aaladaha iyo habaynta kale ee gaarka ah waxay saameyn karaan shaqada sifadan. Haddii aad la kulanto dhibaatooyin, fadlan dib u eeg aaladahaaga iyo qoraallada isticmaalaha, oo ay ku jiraan kuwa caalamiga ah.
